title: CreateCaseRequest
description: Schema for CreateCaseRequest in Nuix REST API

compound.description: Determines whether the case is simple or compound.  Default is false

location.description: Where the case should be created.  e.g. inventory0, inventory1

name.description: The name of the case.  e.g. mycase

binaryStoreLocation.description: Path to file system binary store for this case. It can be shared by cases and should be accessible from all workers. Defaults to null, which means binary store will be within the on-disk portion of the case.
